_comment: Rules that auto-generate the base matchup matrix so you tune a few dozen rules instead of ~2500 cells. For each ordered pair (attacker A, defender B), every rule whose 'attacker' conditions match A AND 'defender' conditions match B contributes its 'value'. Contributions are summed then clamped to [-3, 3]. Specific famous matchups are layered on top via matchup_overrides.json. A condition matches if the hero has ALL listed tags (tags come from the hero's own tags PLUS its sub-role's implied tags). 'subrole' / 'archetype' conditions match exactly. Empty/absent condition = matches anything. Positive value = attacker beats defender. Tune freely; the SIGN and rough magnitude matter more than precision.

rules.note: dive eats immobile backline (snipers, Zen, Ana)
Recon reveal + anti-flank blunts flankers' escapes
brawl closes on poke in tight geometry
poke kites brawl on open sightlines

rules._comment_subrole: --- sub-role PASSIVE interactions (the mechanical basis the new system gives you) ---
rules.note: Bruiser passive reduces crit dmg -> blunts crit-reliant Sharpshooters
Stalwart resists knockback/slow -> CC/boop value drops
Recon wallhacks low-HP escapees -> harder for divers to disengage
Survivor self-regen wins attrition vs poke chip
